name: Infra: Agent Activity Dashboard â†’ GitHub Pages

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT CAST(MAX(ts) AS STRING) AS last_ts
FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.agent_activity_log`
WHERE ts >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

SELECT channel, CAST(MAX(date) AS STRING) AS last_date,
       DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), MAX(date), DAY) AS days_stale
FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.campaigns_daily`
WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY channel

SELECT 'hubspot_leads' AS channel, CAST(MAX(date) AS STRING) AS last_date,
       DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), MAX(date), DAY) AS days_stale
FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
UNION ALL
SELECT 'hubspot_deals', CAST(MAX(date) AS STRING),
       DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), MAX(date), DAY)
FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_deals_daily`

SELECT
  EXTRACT(DAYOFWEEK FROM ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Riyadh') AS dow,
  EXTRACT(HOUR FROM ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Riyadh') AS hr,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.agent_activity_log`
WHERE ts >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
GROUP BY dow, hr
ORDER BY dow, hr

SELECT CAST(ts AS STRING) AS ts, role, action, status, channel, details
FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.agent_activity_log`
WHERE action != 'heartbeat'
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT gid, title, assignee_name, CAST(due_on AS STRING) AS due_on, project_key
FROM (
  SELECT gid, title, assignee_name, due_on, project_key,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY gid ORDER BY due_on ASC NULLS LAST) AS rn
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.asana_task_status`
  WHERE completed = FALSE
  AND title IS NOT NULL AND title != ''
  AND title NOT LIKE '[Direct Log]%'
  AND title NOT LIKE '[Agent Connection Test]%'
)
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY due_on ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'chore(pages): update activity dashboard ' + new Date().toISOString().substring(0,16), content: $('Build HTML').first().json.base64, sha: ($('GitHub - Get SHA').first().json.sha || undefined) }) }}

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT table_name, row_count, CAST(last_modified AS STRING) AS last_modified
FROM (
  SELECT 'campaigns_daily' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count, MAX(CAST(date AS TIMESTAMP)) AS last_modified FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.campaigns_daily`
  UNION ALL SELECT 'hubspot_leads_module_daily', COUNT(*), MAX(CAST(date AS TIMESTAMP)) FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  UNION ALL SELECT 'hubspot_deals_daily', COUNT(*), MAX(CAST(date AS TIMESTAMP)) FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_deals_daily`
  UNION ALL SELECT 'agent_activity_log', COUNT(*), MAX(ts) FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.agent_activity_log`
  UNION ALL SELECT 'asana_task_status', COUNT(*), MAX(synced_at) FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.asana_task_status`
)
ORDER BY table_name
